hero.description: Important information about the use of our service and limitations of liability.

generalDisclaimer.title: General Disclaimer
paragraphs: The information provided by PixBatch (we, us, or our) on our website and through our service is for general informational purposes only. All information on the site is provided in good faith, however we make no representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information on the site or our service.

Under no circumstance shall we have any liability to you for any loss or damage of any kind incurred as a result of the use of the site or service or reliance on any information provided on the site. Your use of the site and service and your reliance on any information on the site is solely at your own risk.

noWarranties.title: No Warranties
noWarranties.intro: The Service is provided to you AS IS and AS AVAILABLE and with all faults and defects without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted under applicable law, we expressly disclaim all warranties, whether express, implied, statutory or otherwise, with respect to the Service, including:
items: Implied warranties of merchantability
Fitness for a particular purpose
Non-infringement
Title or quiet enjoyment
Accuracy or completeness of data
Uninterrupted or error-free operation
noWarranties.outro: We do not warrant that the Service will meet your requirements, achieve any intended results, be compatible or work with any other software, applications, systems or services, operate without interruption, or be error-free or that any errors or defects can or will be corrected.

imageProcessingDisclaimer.title: Image Processing Disclaimer
imageProcessingDisclaimer.intro: While PixBatch processes images in your browser for privacy and security, we cannot guarantee:
items: The quality or accuracy of processed images
That processed images will meet your specific requirements
Compatibility with all image formats or file sizes
Prevention of data loss during processing
That processing will not alter image metadata in unexpected ways
imageProcessingDisclaimer.outro: Important: Always maintain backups of your original images before processing. We are not responsible for any loss, damage, or corruption of images during or after processing.

externalLinksDisclaimer.title: External Links Disclaimer
paragraphs: Our website may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by or in any way affiliated with us. Please note that we do not guarantee the accuracy, relevance, timeliness, or completeness of any information on these external websites.

We have no control over the nature, content, and availability of external sites. The inclusion of any links does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorse the views expressed within them. Should you encounter any inappropriate links or content on external websites, please contact us.

professionalAdviceDisclaimer.title: Professional Advice Disclaimer
paragraphs: The site cannot and does not contain professional advice. The information is provided for general informational and educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional advice.

Accordingly, before taking any actions based upon such information, we encourage you to consult with the appropriate professionals. We do not provide any kind of professional advice. The use or reliance of any information contained on this site is solely at your own risk.

intellectualPropertyRights.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualPropertyRights.intro: You are solely responsible for ensuring that you have the necessary rights and permissions to process any images using our Service. We disclaim all liability for:
items: Copyright infringement or violation of intellectual property rights
Unauthorized use of trademarked images or logos
Violation of third-party rights, including privacy and publicity rights
Processing of images containing illegal or prohibited content
intellectualPropertyRights.outro: By using our Service, you represent and warrant that you own or have obtained all necessary rights, licenses, and permissions for any images you process.

resultsAndPerformance.title: Results and Performance
resultsAndPerformance.intro: Any performance metrics, processing speeds, or quality improvements mentioned on our website or in our marketing materials are provided as general examples only. Actual results may vary significantly based on:
items: Your device specifications and browser capabilities
Image size, format, and complexity
Network connection and bandwidth
Number of images processed simultaneously
Processing options and settings selected
resultsAndPerformance.outro: We do not guarantee any specific results, processing times, or quality improvements. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.intro: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall PixBatch, its affiliates, directors, employees, or agents be liable to you for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages whatsoever resulting from:
items: Your use or inability to use the Service
Any errors or omissions in any content or information
Loss or damage to your images or data
Unauthorized access to or alteration of your transmissions or data
Any other matter relating to the Service
limitationOfLiability.outro: This limitation applies whether the alleged liability is based on contract, tort, negligence, strict liability, or any other basis, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damage.

changesToDisclaimer.title: Changes to This Disclaimer
paragraphs: We reserve the right to make changes to this Disclaimer at any time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this page with an updated Last updated date.
It is your responsibility to review this Disclaimer periodically for any changes. Your continued use of the Service following the posting of changes constitutes your acceptance of such changes.
